final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an editorial illustration of a bustling Lantern Festival street market in traditional Chinese festival style.

Style/medium: 工笔重彩画 (gongbi heavy-color painting), meticulous brushwork with rich mineral pigments, narrative scroll composition inspired by 《清明上河图》 (Qingming Shanghe Tu / Along the River During the Qingming Festival)
Composition: wide panoramic horizontal scroll format, densely populated street scene with layered depth, eye-level perspective looking down the lantern-lit avenue
Subject: ancient Chinese street festival at night, crowds in festive attire, children chasing with rabbit lanterns, vendors selling tangyuan, candied hawthorn, and flower lanterns
Scene/backdrop: historic street lined with shops, red lanterns, palace lanterns, and revolving horse lanterns illuminating the night sky, distant dragon and lion dance troupes with drums, fireworks bursting overhead
Lighting/mood: warm lantern glow casting red-orange light on crowds, festive and celebratory atmosphere, night sky illuminated by countless lights
Color palette: dominant reds, golds, and oranges with accents of warm yellow, creating a harmonious and joyous festive palette
Materials/textures: fine brushwork details, silk-like smooth color application, architectural precision in buildings and lanterns, delicate fabric textures on costumes
Avoid: modern elements, anachronistic objects, photorealistic rendering, plastic textures, 8K stuffer terms, washed-out colors
